endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Which data endpoint to call. Use 'info' to list all endpoints for free.

symbols.title: Crypto Symbols
symbols.description: Crypto symbols e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL

tickers.title: Stock Tickers
tickers.description: Stock or ETF tickers e.g. AAPL, MSFT, SPY

forex_base.title: Forex Base Currency
forex_base.description: Base currency for forex rates e.g. USD, EUR

forex_pairs.title: Forex Pairs Filter
forex_pairs.description: Specific currencies to return, empty means top 30

countries.title: Country Codes
countries.description: ISO 2-letter country codes for energy/europe e.g. DE, HU, FR

keywords.title: Google Trends Keywords
keywords.description: Keywords to track on Google Trends, max 5

geo.title: Google Trends Geography
geo.description: Country code for Google Trends, empty means global e.g. US, HU

country_code.title: X Trends Country
country_code.description: Country for X trending topics e.g. US, GB, DE, JP

ad_keyword.title: Facebook Ad Keyword
ad_keyword.description: Search keyword for Meta Ads Library

ad_country.title: Facebook Ad Country
ad_country.description: Country filter for Facebook ads e.g. ALL, US, HU, DE

amazon_marketplace.title: Amazon Marketplace
amazon_marketplace.description: Amazon country code e.g. US, UK, DE, FR, JP

limit.title: Result Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

demo_mode.title: Demo Mode
demo_mode.description: Skip x402 payment check for testing only

apify_token.title: Apify Token
apify_token.description: Required for ads/facebook and ecommerce/amazon endpoints

x402_payment_signature.title: x402 Payment Signature
x402_payment_signature.description: Auto-provided by x402-compatible AI agents in EIP-3009 format
